input.question: Average number of sections taught per professor by department

payload.question: Average number of sections taught per professor by department

output.sql:
WITH sections_per_prof AS (
  SELECT
    s.professor_id AS professor_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.section_id) AS section_count
  FROM sections s
  GROUP BY s.professor_id
)
SELECT
  d.department_id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  CAST(AVG(COALESCE(sp.section_count, 0)) AS numeric(10,2)) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM professors p
JOIN departments d ON p.department_id = d.department_id
LEFT JOIN sections_per_prof sp ON p.professor_id = sp.professor_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.name
ORDER BY avg_sections_per_professor DESC;

visualization.description: Average number of sections taught per professor, grouped by department.
visualization.title: Average Sections per Professor by Department

payload.sql:
WITH sections_per_prof AS (
  SELECT
    s.professor_id AS professor_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.section_id) AS section_count
  FROM sections s
  GROUP BY s.professor_id
)
SELECT
  d.department_id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  CAST(AVG(COALESCE(sp.section_count, 0)) AS numeric(10,2)) AS avg_sections_per_professor
FROM professors p
JOIN departments d ON p.department_id = d.department_id
LEFT JOIN sections_per_prof sp ON p.professor_id = sp.professor_id
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.name
ORDER BY avg_sections_per_professor DESC;
